name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in reimbursement. We automate expense report generation instead of manual entry of expenses into QuickBooks.
problem_solved: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual entry of expenses into QuickBooks
